title: XPeng Inc Reports Significant Revenue Growth and Improved Margins in Q4 2024
text: XPeng Inc reported significant revenue growth and improved margins in fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 results. The company's gross margin improved to 14.4% in Q4 2024, up 8.2 percentage points from the previous year, with vehicle margin rising to 10.0%. For the full year 2024, gross margin reached 14.3%, an increase of 12.8 percentage points year-over-year. The company achieved its highest-ever gross margin of 15.6% in Q1 2025, an improvement from 12.9% in Q1 2024. Vehicle margin significantly increased to 10.5% in Q1 2025, up from 5.5% in the prior year. XPeng's overall gross profit margin in the second quarter increased from 14.0% in Q2 2024 to 17.3%, with vehicle gross profit margin increasing from 6.4% in Q2 2024 to 14.3%. XPeng's gross margin in Q3 2025 was 20.1%, compared with 15.3% for Q3 2024 and 17.3% for Q2 2025. In Q4 2025, XPeng reported GAAP net profit of RMB 383.2 million, bolstered by a record-high gross margin of 21.3%.
